utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: physical and mental entries with plan names and monthly costs. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: "None included" with no costs. Not fully specified per requirement.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: plan name and €110/month. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: telemedicine €10/month. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: €450/month only, no annual breakdown. Not fully specified.
Thus, 3 items are fully specified out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan includes three selectable items that appear in the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan for physical health, PrimeCare Premium Plan for mental health, and EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel. Telemedicine at €10/month is listed as an additional service and matches the 'Telemedicine Services' item under health enhancement services. Property coverage is 'None included' and does not map to any rated item. Mapped each named plan/service to its exact rating number from the ground truth.
